saveframes.name: entry_citation
tags:
Structural analysis of pituitary adenylate cyclase-activating polypeptides bound
to phospholipid membranes by magic angle spinning solid-state NMR.

saveframes.name: PACAP21
tags:
PACAP(1-21)NH2 (PACAP21) is PACAP27's C-terminal truncated form bound to 
membranes.

saveframes.name: sample_1
tags:
PACAP21 binded to DPPC/DPPG bilayers that were used as membranes.  
The liposome with peptide was once dried and then hydorolyzed under 32% relative 
humidity.

saveframes.name: spectrometer_1
tags:
Static magnetic field was 11.74 T. 
Broadband double and triple resonance MAS probes for the sample rotors with 3.2 
and 4 mm diameters were used.
